name: Fronesis Labs — DCL Evaluator
description: Autonomous AI agent that audits GitHub repos and AI decisions using multi-LLM consensus (Grok + Claude + Nemotron). Every audit is cryptographically sealed via Leibniz Layer on Base Mainnet before publishing — pre-action verification, not post-factum. Pay-per-scan via x402: Quick Scan $1, Standard $5, Deep $15.
